_publications._publicationTitle: The ErbB inhibitors trastuzumab and erlotinib inhibit growth of vestibular schwannoma xenografts in nude mice: a preliminary study.

_contextSnippet: Figure 1 shows representative MRI imaging of xenografts 4 weeks after transplantation... Initial MRIs were taken 4 weeks after implantation... Following treatment the animals were re-imaged
details: Successfully imaged vestibular schwannoma xenografts at 4 weeks and after 12 weeks of treatment, enabling tumor volume measurements
